_meta.purpose: CDR per-loop physchem thresholds for VAM Stage 2.5 + de-novo CDR design priors
consumer_modules: future de-novo CDR design module (ProteinMPNN / RFAntibody bias)
_meta.policy: AbRef-458 powers vh_*/vl_* loci; VHH42 powers vhh_* loci. The two are NOT pooled.
_meta.comparison_semantics: Strict greater-than against quantile bounds (x > p99 -> VETO, x > p95 -> WARN, else PASS). Equality at the bound counts as PASS so degenerate-zero distributions on motif counts behave correctly.

holdout_validation.interpretation: Engineered-derived thresholds applied to natural antibodies. PASS rate ~80-85% on a few metrics (e.g. vh_cdr3 gravy, vl_cdr3 NG/DG motifs) reflects genuine engineered-vs-natural differences (CDR liability scrubbing during engineering), not threshold artifacts.

free_cys.rationale: Free Cys in CDR is intrinsically risky regardless of population frequency.
